name: Office > Administrative > Documentation
basis: Non-field/admin -- confirm with Manny. Documentation = writing scopes, reports, photo logs, warranty/paperwork. Priced as ~0.5 hr admin time, flat. Not a field service; often bundled/unbilled.
sources: Non-field admin/office time; contractor admin billed at reduced/flat rate. No market comp - internal rate. Handyman admin $40-$75/hr typical.

name: Office > Administrative > Permit Processing
refer_note: Permit-pulling and licensed design or engineering sit outside handyman scope. We coordinate the right licensed professional.
basis: Non-field/admin -- confirm with Manny. Permit processing = prep application, submit to Brevard/city, coordinate. ~1.5 hr admin time; actual permit/jurisdiction fees are a separate passthrough. VERIFY: as an insured handyman, permit-required work is usually REFER scope - only pull permits for work legally within the FL 489 exemption.
sources: Permit pulling/runner service $100-$300 admin + actual permit fees passthrough (Brevard/municipal fees vary $50-$500+). Non-field admin task.

name: Office > Project Management > Scheduling
basis: Non-field/admin -- confirm with Manny. Scheduling = coordinating trades/deliveries/customer windows. ~0.3 hr admin, flat. Usually absorbed overhead rather than a customer line item.
sources: Non-field coordination time; typically overhead, not a billed line. No market comp - internal rate.

name: Office > Project Management > Site Supervision
taxonomy_path: Labor > Office > Project Management > Site Supervision
basis: Non-field/admin -- confirm with Manny. Site supervision = on-site oversight of subs/multi-trade work, per hour of presence (~$75/hr). Field-adjacent oversight, not hands-on task labor. Applies only to larger managed jobs.
sources: GC/site supervision billed hourly, often 8-15% of job or $50-$100/hr on multi-trade jobs. Field-adjacent but oversight, not hands-on labor.
